title: Daily Source Digest

stories.title: White House Responds To Ariana Grande Over Absurd ICE Video Criticism
stories.summary:
White House Responds To Ariana Grande Over Absurd ICE Video Criticism. The White House issued a response to pop singer Ariana Grande on Thursday after she slammed the Trump administration for using one of her songs in a social media video about ICE arrests.

“We’ll say this one last time: what’s actually barbaric, inhumane, and heinous are the criminal illegal aliens who have injured and murdered ... BBC: Do not use my music, Ariana Grande tells White House.

BBC reports that grande called a White House video using her song Bye "heinous nonsense", joining multiple artists demanding Trump's team not use their music.

links.headline: Do not use my music, Ariana Grande tells White House
links.excerpt: Grande called a White House video using her song Bye "heinous nonsense", joining multiple artists demanding Trump's team not use their music.

stories.title: British Art Icon David Hockney Dies at Age 88
stories.summary:
British Art Icon David Hockney Dies at Age 88. Artist David Hockney, whose paintings of pools shimmering in the Los Angeles sunshine became icons of 20th-century art, has died.

He was 88.

The post British Art Icon David Hockney Dies at Age 88 appeared first on Breitbart . BBC: King leads tributes to 'giant of the art world' David Hockney.

BBC reports that the artist, who has died at the age of 88, "was one of life's true originals", King Charles says.

links.excerpt: The artist, who has died at the age of 88, "was one of life's true originals", King Charles says.

stories.title: At Least Two Dead, Multiple Injured In Texas Shooting
stories.summary:
At Least Two Dead, Multiple Injured In Texas Shooting. Two people were killed, and 1o victims were reported after a shooting in Midland, Texas, on Friday morning.

Authorities confirmed the suspect is dead after being barricaded inside a building.

Officers responding to the scene encountered gunfire, according to The Texas Tribune. BREAKING: Police are responding to an “active shooter event” in Midland, Texas pic.twitter.com/Kd7UXEOq68 ...

Al Jazeera: At least one killed and nine hospitalised in Texas shooting. Al Jazeera reports that authorities in Midland, Texas, say that suspected attacker confirmed dead after shooting and standoff with police.

stories.title: Cassette tapes were the voice notes of my youth, bringing tales from the diaspora to our living room | Shadi Khan Saif
stories.summary:
Cassette tapes were the voice notes of my youth, bringing tales from the diaspora to our living room | Shadi Khan Saif. A Melbourne exhibition summons memories of my family gathering to listen to stories from distant relatives On a sunny Melbourne winter morning, I visited the State Library of Victoria to catch up with a mate and stumbled upon an exhibition of heartfelt letters and souvenirs that lovers have been sharing with each throughout the ages.

What really caught my eye was a glass box in a neglected corner containing cassette tapes from the past century. It looked like a lost universe redis.

stories.title: The Guardian view on the analogue resurgence: the shock of the old | Editorial
stories.summary:
The Guardian view on the analogue resurgence: the shock of the old | Editorial.

Long-abandoned formats such as cassettes and VHS tapes are finding new life as consumers seek a digital detox Ten years after the last video recorder manufacturer ceased production, the first straight-to-video movie for two decades – This Is How the World Ends – was released this month.

The resurgence of vinyl began long ago; sales are at their highest l.

stories.title: Pokémon Go data trained AI that could assist military drones in war zones
stories.summary:
Pokémon Go data trained AI that could assist military drones in war zones. stories.title: Facebook users report outages, log-in issues
stories.summary:
Facebook users report outages, log-in issues. MANILA, Philippines — Thousands of Facebook users reported problems accessing their accounts Friday night.

Facebook appeared to have experienced a major global outage, as many users cited log-in issues, disruptions affecting other Meta-owned platforms, including Messenger and Instagram.

READ: PNP backs DICT, PCO call for stricter Meta action vs fake news, disinformation Users reported being. Rappler: Thousands of users report Facebook, Messenger outage.

Rappler reports that facebook and Messenger experience widespread outage, affecting users globally as reports surge on social media platforms.

stories.title: DENR probes contractors in earth-balling of trees on Roxas Blvd.
stories.summary:
DENR probes contractors in earth-balling of trees on Roxas Blvd..

MANILA, Philippines — The Department of Environment Natural Resources is already investigating the contractors involved in the reported earth-balling activities along Roxas Boulevard, with a specific focus on whether their methods violated established environmental protocols and the conditions of their permits.

DENR Enforcement personnel have been deployed to conduct an immediate site inspection and verify.

stories.title: Iloilo City marks Independence Day with call for energy, self-reliance
stories.summary:
Iloilo City marks Independence Day with call for energy, self-reliance. ILOILO CITY — The need for energy security and economic resilience took center stage as Iloilo City marked the 128th anniversary of Philippine Independence on Friday, June 12, with officials stressing that true sovereignty goes beyond political freedom.

Held at Plaza Libertad, the commemoration gathered local officials, government employees, civic organizations, students, and uniformed personnel. Philippine Daily Inquirer: Dy echoes Marcos call for selfless leadership on 128th Independence Day.
